description:
You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system (admin login: http://localhost:8000/admin/, username: admin, password: adminpass123). Complete the full regulatory onboarding for a new drone operator.

1. COMPANY & OPERATOR: Register company 'Horizon Aerial Services Pvt Ltd' (common name: 'Horizon Aerial', role: Operator, country: India, email: ops@horizonaerial.in, website: http://www.horizonaerial.in). Create its Operator record (type: Non-LUC, authorized activities: photographing and videotaping, operational authorizations: SORA).

2. PILOTS: Create Person records for (a) Arjun Mehta (email: arjun.mehta@horizonaerial.in) and (b) Priya Sharma (email: priya.sharma@horizonaerial.in). Then create a Pilot record for each, linked to the Horizon Aerial operator, using the 'Default Aerobridge Document'.

3. FLEET: Register two aircraft: 'HA-Scout-01' (flight controller ID: HASC01CTRL001) and 'HA-Scout-02' (flight controller ID: HASC02CTRL002). Both should be Active, operator: Horizon Aerial Services, manufacturer: Aerobridge Drone Company. Use the pre-configured 'Horizon Surveyor X1' assemblies.

4. CERTIFICATION FLIGHT: Create Flight Plan 'Mumbai Harbor Survey' with a GeoJSON Polygon covering the Mumbai harbor area (approx 18.94N, 72.84E) and a non-empty plan file JSON. Then create Flight Operation 'HA Fleet Certification Flight' using aircraft HA-Scout-01, pilot Arjun Mehta, operator Horizon Aerial, plan Mumbai Harbor Survey, purpose photographing, type VLOS, scheduled 2026-04-01 09:00 to 12:00.
